scripts.proto:gen: rm -rf src/generated && mkdir -p src/generated && protoc --ts_out src/generated --ts_opt long_type_number --ts_opt server_none --proto_path ../crates/coral-api/proto ../crates/coral-api/proto/coral/v1/resources.proto ../crates/coral-api/proto/coral/v1/catalog.proto ../crates/coral-api/proto/coral/v1/query.proto ../crates/coral-api/proto/coral/v1/sources.proto
scripts.build: npm run proto:gen && tsc -b && vite build
